zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude de Soissons於大約1170年出生在法國豪-德-福朗斯艾斯索頌斯時，她的父親Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy19歲，母親Alix de Dreux15歲。她於1193年與Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency在法國i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1222年9月26日在她的家鄉享年53歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude de Soissons于大约1170年出生在法国豪-德-福朗斯艾斯索頌斯时，她的父亲Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy19岁，母亲Alix de Dreux15岁。她于1193年与Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency在法国i萊-德-福朗斯瓦爾-達瓦薩瑟勒斯蒙特莫倫希结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1222年9月26日在她的家乡享年53岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Soissons
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Sisson , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Sisson
meanings: from the Middle English female personal name Sis(se), Cisse, a pet form of Cecily (see Sisley ) + -son.
variant of Syson, a habitational name from Syston (Leicestershire), from a short form of an Old English personal name such as Sigehǣth or Sigefrith + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude de Soissons was born about 1170, in Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, her father, Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy, was 19 and her mother, Alix de Dreux, was 15. She married Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency in 1193, in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 September 1222, in her hometown, at the age of 53.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude de Soissons est née environ 1170, à Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, France, son père, Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy, avait 19 ans et sa mère, Alix de Dreux, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency en 1193, à Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 septembre 1222, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude de Soissons um 1170 in Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy 19 und ihre Mutter Alix de Dreux 15. Sie hat 1193 in Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Frankreich Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. September 1222 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Soissons è nata il circa 1170 nel Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, sua padre, Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy, aveva 19 anni e sua madre, Alix de Dreux, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency nel 1193, nel Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 settembre 1222, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Soissonsが約1170年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスエイスンソイソンスで生まれた時，父Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvyは19歳，母Alix de Dreuxは15歳であった。1193年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスヴァル-ド'オイゼサルセレスモントモーエンシでMathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorencyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1222年9月26日に故郷で53歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude de Soissons(이)가 대략 1170년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 아이스니 소이손스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy(은)는 19세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alix de Dreux(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 1193년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 발-드'이스 사르셀레스 몽모렌시에서 Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1222년 9월 26일 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude de Soissons nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, França, seu pai, Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy, tinha 19 anos e sua mãe, Alix de Dreux, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency em 1193, em Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de setembro de 1222, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude de Soissons родилась около 1170 г. в местности соиссонс, эисн, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция, её отцу по имени Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy было 19 лет, а матери, которую звали Alix de Dreux, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency в 1193 г. в местности монтморенси, сарселлесь, вал-д'оис, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 сентября 1222 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude de Soissons nació aproximadamente 1170, en Soissons, Aisne, Hauts-de-France, Francia, su papá, Raoul de Nesle III "Le Bon"  Seigneur de Nesle et Falvy, tenía 19 años y su mamá, Alix de Dreux, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Mathieu II 'the Great' de Montmorency en 1193, en Montmorency, Sarcelles, Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de septiembre de 1222, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años.
